title: Release notes
excerpt: description: Latest changes and updates to Cloudflare R2 object storage. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [ Subscribe to RSS ](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/platform/release-notes/index.xml) * You can now [empty a bucket](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/buckets/delete-buckets/) or [delete folders](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/objects/delete-objects/#delete-a-folder) directly from the R2 dashboard without writing scripts or configuring lifecycle rules.
